name: Bicara Therapeutics Inc.
business: Bicara Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing bifunctional therapies for solid tumors. Its lead product candidate, ficerafusp alfa, is a bifunctional EGFR-directed antibody combined with a TGF-β ligand trap, currently being studied in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC). The company has no approved products and has not generated any revenue.
sellsTo: healthcare providers targeting HNSCC and other squamous cell carcinomas

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company committed to bringing transformative bifunctional therapies to patients with solid tumors.

catalysts.event: Expected substantial enrollment in FORTIFI-HN01 pivotal trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to be substantially enrolled by the end of 2026 to enable an interim analysis in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Interim analysis of FORTIFI-HN01 pivotal trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to be substantially enrolled by the end of 2026 to enable an interim analysis in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Preliminary safety and efficacy data from CRC Phase 1/2 study
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present preliminary safety and efficacy data from the monotherapy and combination therapy cohorts in the second half of 2026.
